title: Automation Engineer
description:
Specializing in service and commissioning of Marine Automation Systems preferably Lyngsoe marine system.

  • Strong technical background within automation field, ideally within maritime environments.
  • In-depth knowledge of PC-based control and monitoring systems.
  • Customer focussed with a commercial mind-set and solution oriented.
  • Strong communication skills both written and verbal.
  • Troubleshooting and remote maintenance of various automation products including boiler controls and calibration/replacement of related field instruments.
  • Field Service attendance - Onboard vessels
  • Installation and customization of automation hardware and software as per OEM and well as job specific requirements
  • Analysis, configuration and installation of network equipment
  • Programming of PROM and EPROM chips as per OEM requirements
  • Experience with Marine automation system from Lyngsoe Marine 2100, 2200 and Platinum Nacos trained & experienced.
  • Programming of serial communication lines such as RS232, RS422 and RS485 ,HART.FF Etc..
  • Knowledge of Modbus RTU/TCP, OPC server/client configuration, PID configuration and tuning etc…
  • Software customization using various PLC and SCADA based mimic preparations
  • Perform Retrofit tasks and upgrade of existing automation systems.
  • Experience in below system:EMS - Engine Manoeuvring Systems
    EPS - Engine Protection Systems
    PCS - Propulsion Control System
    UCS/MCS – Machinery control system

Requirements:

  • Should be an engineering graduate in Electrical & Electronics, Mechatronics, Instrumentation or Electronics & Telecommunication
  • With minimum 5-8 years of experience in the similar position
  • Good communication skill (written & oral)
  • A good team player & out of the box thinker
  • Holding a Singapore driving license an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Elcome, founded in 1970, is one of the largest marine technology system integrators in the world. With offices from Spain to Singapore, Elcome is firmly positioned to provide world-class support for your fleet.


Elcome’s factory trained engineers visit more than 800 ships every month worldwide with an impressive first-time fix-rate of 96 percent and is supported by shore-based network of 23 business centers located in 12 countries from Strait of Gibraltar to Straits of Malacca.


The Elcome Group employs a workforce of over 500 people, 40 percent of which are factory-trained engineers and technicians. Areas of specialization include navigation, communication, automation, homeland security, satellite airtime and connectivity services, nautical charts & publications, safety, electricals, training, shipboard service, and lifecycle extension support.
postedCompany.name: ELCOME INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
